reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
Bhaiii this stupid school doesn’t even have proper benches. They’re so damn uncomfortable that you literally can’t sit properly. First they should fix their benches and make them decent, then they can start praising their school.

My girlfriend had her board exam there today and she was so uncomfortable sitting on those awful benches. How is anyone supposed to focus on an exam like that, man? Overall the school is fine, but at least change the damn benches. It’s basic.

reviews.review_body: Bhaiii ye bcc schoolll meinn benchhh hi acheee nahiiii haiii itneee uncomfortablee haii baith hi nahi paate inko bolo pehle bench lagvaaye sahi fir apne school ke baare mein taareefein kare bc … merii gf ne yaha board exam diya hai apna aaj she was so uncomfortablee to sit mannn exam kaise hoga bhai agar bench hi aise bekar se hai overall school theek hai but just bench change karvaaooo yaar bc

This school is openly demanding BRIBES for admission. I was shocked when the admin staff blatantly asked me for ₹80,000 in cash (no receipt, no refund, no record.)
This is illegal under the Delhi School Education Act, 1973 and violates CBSE admission guidelines that prohibit capitation fees or donations. Such corruption destroys trust in educational institutes.

Why is this tolerated, and why aren’t authorities cracking down on it?
There is no way Govt. / Babus aren''t aware of this.
